channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Berating a small mattress dumped directly in alleyway directly opposite 31 Owen Close it They were dumped there by the owner of the white garage nearby when clearing his garage., 30th March
item.description:
Bedstead and mattress dumped in the alleyway opposite 31 Owen Close. Also rubbish dropped under the second tree on the left side of Owen Close. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Owen Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road surface, craters on Brecknock Rd by Brecknock dental, 30th March
item.description:
Not just potholes. Large craters. Sections of road surface missing. V dangerous for cyclists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Brecknock Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 30th March
item.description:
Flyposting thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134-138, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights are not working, 30th March
item.description:
Lights are not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small pot hole, 30th March
item.description:
A few houses in a row 43/45/47 we are getting vibration in our houses from the road traffic a small pot hole has appeared outside 45 Dunkery road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet., 30th March
item.description:
This is on the right just as you go into Lettsom St from Camberwell Grove. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist graffiti is back, 30th March
item.description:
This time on trees, can it be cleaned? Far right at George’s cross now being sprayed on trees.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morpeth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large paving company poster, 30th March
item.description:
Attached to lampost
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, over flowing bins, 30th March
item.description:
People who don’t live on the estate are fly tipping. Now foxes are all over the bins. The poor estate cleaner can never get on top of it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pond Farm Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 30th March
item.description:
Vehicle hasn’t moved at all for 2 months and isn’t parked correctly which is causing obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root, 30th March
item.description:
I tripped , fell and injured my cheek , elbows and knees on the sidewalk in Westfield Road . A white line has been drawn around a protruding tree root . that is covered by asphalt . This incident occurred on Saturday 29th April . I am deeply concerned that others will suffer a similar fate .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westfield Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed at 42 Clapham Road SW9 0JQ. The wording spells EVOK in silver spray paint. Please can the graffiti be removed it would greatly benefit the street. The graffiti has been there for quite some time at least six months or more., 30th March
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed at 42 Clapham Road SW9 OJQ. The graffiti is in silver spray paint and spells the word EVOK. It has been there for quite some time at least six months or more. Please can it be removed it would greatly improve the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Clapham Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish on pavement and road, 30th March
item.description:
I am writing to formally complain about the condition of Olinda Road. Rubbish frequently overflows onto the pavement and road, creating foul smells and an unsanitary environment, and loose waste is often blown around due to poor recycling and disposal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olinda Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many black and grey bags from rogue builder dumped in several places across the verge of Ravensbourne Avenue. Dumped pushchair on opposite side of road., 30th March
item.description:
Many black and grey bags from rogue builder dumped in several places across the verge of Ravensbourne Avenue between Crab Hill and 208 Ravensbourne Avenue. Also, dumped pushchair on opposite side of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin, 30th March
item.description:
Abandoned bins filled with something stinking (soil? Kitchen compost?) been sitting on the pavement for weeks now despite reporting it to yeh council already. PLEASE REMOVE IT.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside house number 2(end of Lindfield gardens going towards Arkwright Road), 30th March
item.description:
I am writing to formally report a significant safety hazard regarding overgrown plants originating from House Number 2. The plants have grown across the public pavement, obstructing approximately half of the walkway. More importantly, the plants are extremely sharp and positioned at eye level, posing a severe risk of injury to pedestrians. Due to the high risk of a "sight-threatening" injury, I request that this be inspected and remediated as soon as possible. Thank you for your prompt attention to this health and safety matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Lindfield Gardens, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 30th March
item.description:
The street light is not working making the end of the close very dark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roundwood, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned mattress, 30th March
item.description:
Another mattress has been dumped on the side of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Howard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in EV charging bay continuously for several days, 30th March
item.description:
This car has been parked in this EV charging spot for several days (at least 3 but probably more). As you can see from the 3 green lights on the charger, it is not actively charging so should have been moved so someone else can charge their vehicle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost Light Not Working, 30th March
item.description:
Lampost light is not working What3words: ///slate.kings.trap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Wadhurst Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
